scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd .. && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const root=process.cwd();const pub=path.join(root,'public');fs.rmSync(pub,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.mkdirSync(pub,{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(path.join(root,'frontend','dist'),pub,{recursive:true})"
